description: Continuously monitor whether GPS devices are actively reporting, and automatically transition them between online, offline, and unknown states based on configurable inactivity thresholds, emitting ...

actors.name: GPS Device
actors.description: Physical hardware that transmits positions; its silence drives offline detection

actors.name: Inactivity Checker
actors.description: Periodically scans devices whose last_update has exceeded the inactivity threshold

actors.name: Fleet User
actors.description: Views real-time device status in the fleet map or device list

fields.name: status
fields.label: Current connectivity status: online, offline, or unknown

fields.name: last_update
fields.label: Timestamp of the most recently received position from this device

fields.name: inactivity_start
fields.label: Milliseconds of silence after which the device is flagged as inactive; inherited from group if no...

fields.name: inactivity_period
fields.label: Repeat interval (milliseconds) for generating repeated inactivity events after the initial one

values.label: Unknown
values.description: Device has registered but never transmitted a position

values.label: Online
values.description: Device transmitted a position within the inactivity_start window

values.label: Offline
values.description: Device has not transmitted within the inactivity_start window

transitions.description: Device resumes transmitting after a period of silence
Device registered but never reported within threshold period

processing.online_on_position_received: Status transitions to online as soon as a new position is received, regardless of current status
processing.offline_on_inactivity_threshold: Status transitions to offline when (current_time - last_update) > inactivity_start
processing.threshold_inheritance: If inactivity_start is not set on the device, it inherits the value from the parent group or server default
processing.check_schedule: The inactivity check runs on a configurable schedule (typically every few minutes); status is not updated in real time between check runs
processing.repeated_inactivity_events: If inactivity_period is set, repeated inactivity events are generated each time the silence duration increases by another inactivity_period interval

event_emission.transitions_trigger_notifications: Status transitions are recorded as events and can trigger notifications to fleet users

device_comes_online.result: Device status is updated to online and subscribers are notified

device_goes_offline.result: Device is marked offline; alert handlers can dispatch notifications to users

given: device continues to be silent beyond additional inactivity_period intervals
device_remains_inactive.result: Repeated inactivity event emitted at each period boundary while device remains silent

errors.message: The specified device does not exist

events.name: device.online
events.description: Device has resumed transmitting positions after being offline or unknown

events.name: device.offline
events.description: Device has exceeded the inactivity threshold without transmitting

events.name: device.inactive
events.description: Device remains silent beyond a repeated inactivity period boundary

related.reason: Devices must be registered before their status can be tracked
Receiving a position is the trigger for transitioning to online
Offline events can be routed as notifications to fleet users
